title: EKA CODENAMES.yml (v1)
description: Schema for the CODENAMES.yml file at the root of every L2+ repo. Itself L2-classified.

employees.description: Employee codes registered but mapped via HRIS, not here. code_only must be true.

name.description: Real entity name. Set to '{Confidential X}' placeholder for entities whose existence is not public.

mnemonic.description: Single capitalized word from the org's chosen theme (Roman gods, constellations, etc.).

disclosure.description: Whether this entity's relationship is publicly known.

engagement_stage.description: Stage of the engagement. Determines the breadth of internal access. pre-rfp/rfp/negotiation: account leads only. live: account leads + collaborating internal teams. historical: archived access (HR + legal + compliance only).

since.description: When the relationship began (year, optionally quarter).

primary_owner.description: Account owner / point of contact for this entity.

internal_team_groups.description: Workspace groups granted access when engagement_stage = live. Examples: ['s2i-eng@', 's2i-product@', 's2i-data@']. Empty for pre-live stages (account-lead-only access).

notes.description: Free-text. Public-statement references, key context, contract notes.
